prerequisites.value: Cha 17, Ephemeral Tread, Lucid Dreamer, Knowledge (planes) 10 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** When in the Dimension of Dreams in your physical body, you gain an additional attempt at an impossible action per day, for a total of two attempts. However, as a result of your meddling with the fabric of the realm, when you travel to the Dimension of Dreams in your physical body, you must succeed at a DC 15 Charisma check or arrive at a disadvantage.
